pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.1 to 3.5.5 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Set the target Java version property to 21 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Change project packaging to 'pom' to support a multi-module structure.
Define the list of child modules for the multi-module Maven project.
Move dependencies from direct <dependencies> to <dependencyManagement> to enforce version consistency across modules.
Add Maven profiles for app, dev, and test environments to manage configuration properties.
Add version properties for MapStruct, Lombok, and JAXB plugins to centralize version management.
Remove the JitPack repository definition as it is no longer needed or managed centrally.
Remove legacy dependencies that are no longer used or are managed differently in the new structure.
Update Maven Surefire plugin and other build plugins to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude Maven Versions Plugin backup files from version control to keep the repository clean.
Exclude the Maven build output directory from version control.

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI base image from a specific JDK 11 Maven version to the latest Maven image to support JDK 21.
Define MAVEN_OPTS to set the local repository path for consistent caching behavior.
Explicitly define the pipeline stages (build, test, package, deploy) to structure the CI flow.
Add global cache configuration for Maven repository and target directories to speed up builds.
Create a dedicated Build job for the build stage using Maven compile.
Create a dedicated Test job for the test stage using Maven test.
Create a dedicated Package job for the package stage using Maven package.
Create a dedicated Deploy job for the deploy stage.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
Deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Maven deploy started"

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Rename and restructure the SonarCloud job to fit the new pipeline structure and remove hardcoded image dependency.

Jenkinsfile.general_idea: Changed the Git repository URL to point to the new project location.
Removed hardcoded Git credentials ID, likely relying on environment or pipeline defaults.
Updated the Jenkins config file ID for Maven settings to match the new project name.

README.md.general_idea: Replace outdated project documentation with current version information and remove obsolete API endpoint listings.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README content with 'Manager 2.0 - Development Version 2026.2 - 1st May, 2026'
